AFC_Synthetic_Jet_Actuators_Descr: Basic boundary-layer management system from Aerotech. Employs active micro-nozzles to reduce aerodynamic drag on the wing surfaces. Lightweight and highly reliable.
AFC_Compressed_Air_Injection_Descr: Pressurized boundary-layer control system. Actively ejects compressed air from wing surfaces to manipulate airflow, providing drag reduction at the cost of additional mass.
AFC_Helium_Flow_Actuators_Descr: Advanced micro-jet system utilizing lightweight helium flow to stabilize wing turbulence. Achieves high-efficiency drag reduction with minimal weight penalty.
AFC_Plasma_Flow_Actuators_Descr: Cutting-edge ionization grid that converts atmospheric airflow into a plasma boundary layer. Drastically reduces aerodynamic drag, offering unmatched high-speed performance.
FCS_Evaporative_Cooling_Descr: Entry-level thermal regulator using passive phase-change evaporation. Moderately increases fuel capacity by keeping fuel cells within optimal temperature cycles.
FCS_Cryocoolers_Descr: Closed-loop cryocooler system from Cryo-Dyn. Actively manages battery temperatures to achieve higher fuel capacity and clean power output.
FCS_Liquid_Nitrogen_Descr: High-performance cooling circuit utilizing liquid nitrogen storage. Dramatically cools the fuel system, significantly boosting fuel density and electrical throughput capacity.
FCS_Liquid_Hydrogen_Descr: Ultra-cryogenic liquid hydrogen heat exchanger. Extremely efficient deep-cooling system that maximizes fuel capacity. Requires specialized thermal insulation.
FCS_Liquid_Helium_Descr: State-of-the-art liquid helium cooling system for top-tier aircraft. Achieves near-absolute zero temperatures, providing unmatched fuel density at the cost of substantial system mass.
CCS_Field_Compression_Scarab_Descr: Compact electromagnetic field compressor. Compresses cargo containers at a sub-atomic level to expand effective cargo compartment capacity.
CCS_Spatial_Compression_Scarab_Descr: Advanced spatial folding module developed by SpatialTech. Temporarily dilates gravity inside the cargo bay to achieve massive capacity gains with low power draw.
CCS_Mass_Reorganization_Scarab_Descr: Prototype molecular restructuring grid. Rearranges cargo particles at a molecular level to maximize container packing density and space utilization.
AOS_Passive_Depreciation_Scarab_Descr: Basic kinetic dampening array. Reduces stress from cargo movement on the hull during extreme maneuvers, but slightly limits maximum cargo volume.
AOS_Inductive_Stabilization_Scarab_Descr: Active electromagnetic induction field that cushions cargo momentum. Significantly reduces overload stress during high-G flight.
AOS_Inertia_Bubble_Descr: Generates a localized micro-gravitational inertia bubble around the cargo bay. Heavily dampens cargo mass shifting to protect ship integrity from overload.
AOS_Gravitational_Alignment_Scarab_Descr: Military-grade gravitational alignment grid. Suppresses virtual mass shifting in the cargo hold, allowing extreme flight maneuvers with heavy cargo without overload risk.
FuelInjectors_Standard_Scarab_Descr: Factory-spec fuel injectors from Titan-Core with optimized nozzle geometry. Provides a stable, entry-level boost to engine thrust.
FuelInjectors_HighPressure_Scarab_Descr: Military-surplus high-pressure injectors. Forces high-density fuel spray into combustion chambers to generate substantial engine thrust.
FuelInjectors_Plasma_Scarab_Descr: Experimental plasma-arc injectors that pre-ionize fuel particles prior to ignition. Unlocks extreme engine thrust and performance for high-speed flight.
FuelPumping_Mechanical_Scarab_Descr: Classic gear-driven mechanical pump. Optimizes fuel flow consistency to reduce wasteful engine fuel consumption. Reliable and lightweight.
FuelPumping_Electric_Scarab_Descr: Variable-speed electric fuel pump with electronic flow control. Intelligently throttles fuel delivery to yield significant fuel consumption savings.
FuelPumping_Turbine_Scarab_Descr: Centrifugal turbine pump with zero-pulsation magnetic bearings. Achieves flawless fuel atomization for maximum engine fuel economy.
FuelSystem_Extended_Scarab_Descr: Auxiliary bladder tanks and external routing lines. Provides a straightforward expansion of the ship's total fuel capacity.
FuelSystem_HighCapacity_Scarab_Descr: Conformal fuel cells integrated directly into the ship's primary structural hull, offering a massive increase in flight range.
FuelSystem_Integrated_Scarab_Descr: Complete fuel system redesign with wet-wing engineering. Maximizes total fuel capacity while optimizing fuel feed lines to lower overall consumption.
Coating_Thermal_Scarab_Descr: Reflective polymer heat-shield coating developed by SolarTech. Provides excellent thermal deflection and radiation shielding for light aircraft.
Coating_Ceramic_Scarab_Descr: Multi-layered ceramic plating designed for planetary cruisers. Provides exceptional thermal deflection, structural reinforcement, and reduces atmospheric air drag.
Coating_Nanocomposite_Scarab_Descr: Self-healing nanocomposite alloy with active boundary-layer micro-textures. Offers premium shield integrity and superior aerodynamic drag reduction.
